div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 348px; height: 1px; padding-top: 175px; margin-left: 58px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0px; text-align: center;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; overflow-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Enviar pixel
Load pixel_color[23:0]
color_register <- 23'bX
bits_counter <- 0
done <- 0

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 198px; height: 1px; padding-top: 420px; margin-left: 133px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0px; text-align: center;

display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 348px; height: 1px; padding-top: 185px; margin-left: 1006px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0px; text-align: center;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; overflow-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Pulse Generator
Load bit_value
Load do_reset
PULSE_0_HIGH = 400ns*SYS_CLK_FREQ_MHZ
PULSE_1_HIGH = 850ns*SYS_CLK_FREQ_MHZ
PULSE_DURATION = 1250ns*SYS_CLK_FREQ_MHZ
RST_DURATION = 50_000ns*SYS_CLK_FREQ_MHZ
pulse_out <- 1'b0
pulse_counter <- 0
done_high <- 1'b0
done_reset <- 1b'0
done <- 1'b0
